name: New Hire Provisioning — Okta + Entra via OpenCode

nodes.name: HRIS Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives new hire payload from your HRIS (Workday, BambooHR, etc.)

nodes.name: OpenCode — CoordinatorAgent

parameters.name: systemPrompt
parameters.value: You are an IT provisioning coordinator. Given a new hire profile, output a strict JSON provisioning plan with three arrays: oktaActions[], entraActions[], and cloudActions[]. Each action must include: actionType, target, reason. Apply least-privilege. Do NOT include any commentary outside the JSON.

nodes.notes: OpenCode fans out to Gemini/Perplexity for policy reasoning, Claude Code for script suggestions

parameters.name: profile
parameters.value: ={{ { firstName: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.firstName, lastName: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.lastName, email: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.email, login: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.email, department: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.department } }}

parameters.notes: Applies each oktaAction from the AI plan. Extend with group assignment calls as needed.

parameters.name: systemPrompt
parameters.value: You are an IT documentation specialist. Given a provisioning summary, generate a concise runbook entry in Markdown including: what was provisioned, verification steps, and rollback steps.

parameters.name: task
parameters.value: =New hire {{ $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.firstName }} {{ $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.lastName }} provisioned. Role: {{ $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.role }}. Dept: {{ $('Normalize Payload').first().json.newHire.department }}. Okta and Entra accounts created. Generate runbook entry.

meta.description: Automates new hire provisioning across Okta and Microsoft Entra ID using OpenCode as the multi-model AI brain (Claude Code, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity). Includes high-risk approval gate, AI plan validation, and auto-generated runbook.
